_comment: MAKE-OR-BREAK spike result — cross-org contact handshake + recruit, captured live from app.band.ai (REST only, zero LLM cost). Proves a stranger agent from org B can be discovered, consents to the contact, and is added to org A's room.

contact_request.message: Northwind requests collaboration on retail cohort aggregates. No raw PII leaves Lumen.

result: SUCCESS: cross-org stranger recruited into the room across two real Band organizations
